narration: This is where the signal came from. The thing that called us across the galaxy. I have decoded it at last, and it changes everything. The message was not alien. It was human. Sent from here, a thousand years before humanity ever left Earth. Someone went before us. And they are still calling.

shots.prompt: A colossal ancient megastructure floats in deep space, kilometers wide, a ring of impossible architecture glowing with soft gold and cyan light, slowly rotating among the stars. Jaw-dropping scale reveal.
The tiny starship drifts toward the enormous structure, dwarfed beside its glowing surface, the camera pulling back to show how small the ship truly is. Overwhelming sense of awe.
Vast doors in the megastructure split open silently, brilliant warm light pouring out into space, illuminating the approaching ship. Cinematic, reverent, building wonder.
Inside: a cathedral of impossible geometry and floating light, a single radiant beacon pulsing at its center like a heartbeat. Ethereal, sacred atmosphere.
Within the beacon's light a flickering human face and an ancient glowing symbol form and dissolve, a message from the deep past. Mysterious, emotional, uncanny.
The starship drifts slowly into the radiant light until everything turns to pure brilliant white, a cliffhanger fade. Hypnotic, leaving the viewer breathless.
